mapper.select: SELECT item_id , portfolio_id , stock_cd , hold_qty , buy_price , buy_dt , buy_amount , currency , memo , use_yn , reg_dt , upd_dt FROM tbl_portfolio_item WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT item_id , portfolio_id , stock_cd , hold_qty , buy_price , buy_dt , buy_amount , currency , memo , use_yn , reg_dt , upd_dt FROM tbl_portfolio_item WHERE portfolio_id = #{portfolioId} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY buy_dt DESC

SELECT item_id , portfolio_id , stock_cd , hold_qty , buy_price , buy_dt , buy_amount , currency , memo , use_yn , reg_dt , upd_dt FROM tbl_portfolio_item WHERE portfolio_id = #{portfolioId} AND stock_cd = #{stockCd} AND use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT pi.stock_cd AS stockCd , COUNT(DISTINCT p.user_id) AS holderCount FROM tbl_portfolio_item pi JOIN tbl_portfolio p ON pi.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id WHERE pi.use_yn = 'Y' AND p.use_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY pi.stock_cd ORDER BY holderCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_portfolio_item SET use_yn = 'N' , upd_dt = NOW() WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND use_yn = 'Y'
